title: Tangy Australian Kale Salad
description: A vibrant, grassy kale salad with creamy dressing, crunchy walnuts, feta, fresh mint, and fluffy meringue nests for a post-workout boost.

ingredients.name: Creamy dressing
ingredients.amount: Greek yogurt 40g, Dijon mustard 1 tsp, Milk 30ml, Lemon juice 10ml, Olive oil 5ml, Salt and pepper

instructions: Wash and chop kale into bite-size pieces.
Whisk together lemon juice, vinegar, honey, salt, pepper, and olive oil to create a vinaigrette.
Toss kale with vinaigrette until evenly coated and let rest for 5 minutes.
Beat egg whites to soft peaks, then gradually add sugar and continue beating until stiff, glossy peaks form.
Spoon meringue into small nests on parchment paper and bake at 200°C for 12 minutes until golden.
Combine Greek yogurt, mustard, milk, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper in a bowl, whisking until emulsified.
Stir walnuts and mint into the dressing to coat.
Fold the dressing over the rested kale, then top with crumbled feta and meringue nests.
Serve immediately as a fresh, post-workout salad.
